title: Garlicky Roasted Eggplant

Compound Butter: 1 tablespoon sliced fresh chives, plus more for garnish

steps: Preheat oven to 425°F with racks in the upper and lower thirds.
Combine eggplant pieces, 6 tablespoons olive oil, 2 teaspoons oregano, ¾ teaspoon pepper, and ¾ teaspoon salt in a large bowl; toss until evenly coated.
Divide eggplant between 2 large rimmed baking sheets and spread in an even layer (reserve the bowl).
Add 5 unpeeled garlic cloves to the baking sheets alongside the eggplant.
Roast, stirring the eggplant and garlic and rotating the pans between the racks halfway through, until the eggplant is browned and tender, 25 to 30 minutes.
Squeeze the roasted garlic from its skins into the reserved bowl; discard the skins.
Mash the garlic with a fork until smooth.

Add softened butter, 1 tablespoon chives, 1 teaspoon lemon zest, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, ¼ teaspoon crushed red pepper, and the remaining ¼ teaspoon pepper and ⅛ teaspoon salt; stir to combine.
Add the roasted eggplant to the bowl; toss gently to coat with the garlic butter mixture.
Garnish with additional sliced chives before serving.
